dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal captures failed range breakouts/breakdowns using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as range boundaries. Entry triggers when price breaks a boundary then immediately reverses (detected by comparing current close to previous close). Exit uses immediate reversal logic as author provided no explicit exit conditions. Extremely short hold_days_max (1) reflects the 'extremely short term' time horizon mentioned. Stop loss kept tight at 1.5% given the trap reversal nature where trapped traders' covering moves are sharp but can quickly reverse if the trap fails.

Entry triggers when price breaks a boundary then immediately reverses (detected by comparing current close to previous close). Exit uses immediate reversal logic as author provided no explicit exit conditions. Extremely short hold_days_max (1) reflects the 'extremely short term' time horizon mentioned. Stop loss kept tight at 1.5% given the trap reversal nature where trapped traders' covering moves are sharp but can quickly reverse if the trap fails.

source_rule_text: Trade failed range breakouts and breakdowns by entering in the direction of the trap reversal, as trapped traders covering positions create sharp price moves.
